description: Maps every critique ledger evidence class to its retention, redaction, privacy, and encryption policy using only landed WBC enum values.

evidence_class_mappings.description: Raw prompts sent to critique producer models and their completion outputs.
evidence_class_mappings.access: restricted to critique_ledger owner domain writers and compatibility readers
evidence_class_mappings.reopen_behavior: Reopen requires preserved repository at exact source revision
evidence_class_mappings.rationale: Prompts and completions may contain sensitive plan details and model interactions. Redacted on by default, encrypted at rest, governed references for audit trail.

evidence_class_mappings.description: CritiqueOccurrenceEnvelope records with occurrence_id, finding_id, semantic_finding_id, and producer metadata.
evidence_class_mappings.reopen_behavior: Reopen requires accepted FindingReconciliationEvent from evaluator
evidence_class_mappings.rationale: Occurrence envelopes contain producer-local finding IDs and metadata that should not be exposed beyond the critique ledger domain.

evidence_class_mappings.description: FindingReconciliationEvent records mapping occurrence IDs to canonical finding IDs with relationship types.
evidence_class_mappings.reopen_behavior: Reopen requires new FindingReconciliationEvent from evaluator authority
evidence_class_mappings.rationale: Reconciliation decisions are the semantic authority — they must be preserved verbatim with no redaction to maintain the integrity of finding relationships. Field-level encryption protects sensitive fields while allowing structural audit.

evidence_class_mappings.description: FindingDispositionEvent records across 8 disposition families with reason_subcodes, severity, evidence limits, action/non-action, and reopen predicates.
evidence_class_mappings.reopen_behavior: Reopen requires new FindingDispositionEvent with reopen predicate satisfied
evidence_class_mappings.rationale: Dispositions encode accountability decisions — acted-on, ignored, deferred, rejected decisions must survive redaction. Field-level encryption protects sensitive rationale fields.

evidence_class_mappings.description: DomainBriefingEnvelope with provisional CL1 budgets (standard: 2 domains/10 findings, high: 4/25, exhaustive: all/unbounded), linked spillover, and no silent truncation.
evidence_class_mappings.access: restricted to critique_ledger owner domain and briefing recipients
evidence_class_mappings.reopen_behavior: Reopen requires regenerating briefing from current manifest state
evidence_class_mappings.rationale: Briefings are consumable projections — they may contain cross-domain findings and should be protected but not retained beyond the run.

evidence_class_mappings.description: LedgerRevisionManifest with freshness vectors, included/excluded reasons, cross-domain references, input-set hashes, prior-revision hashes, and completeness maps.
evidence_class_mappings.reopen_behavior: Reopen requires rebuilding manifest from complete event chain
evidence_class_mappings.rationale: Manifests are the authoritative revision anchor — they chain revisions via prior-revision hashes. Must be preserved verbatim to maintain the integrity of the append-only ledger.

evidence_class_mappings.description: Evidence artifacts stored in private repositories including evaluator credentials, model API keys, runtime secrets, and WBC activation receipts.
evidence_class_mappings.reopen_behavior: Reopen requires access to private repository with valid credentials
evidence_class_mappings.rationale: Private repository evidence is never captured in the public corpus. Access requires governed references with field-level encryption. Redaction is NONE after secret exclusion (secrets are never captured).

evidence_class_mappings.description: Frozen M6 corpus fixture with redacted paths, dual SHA-256 hashing, and explicit unavailable evidence with reopen conditions.
evidence_class_mappings.tombstone: marker_tombstone when source repo is unavailable
evidence_class_mappings.reopen_behavior: Reopen requires preserved repository at exact source revision
evidence_class_mappings.rationale: The corpus is the frozen M6 evidence — must be retained for audit but with path redaction to prevent workspace leakage.
